parameters.query: SELECT document_id, client_id, document_uuid, original_filename, storage_path, mime_type, document_type, status, metadata FROM documents WHERE status = 'uploaded' ORDER BY received_at ASC LIMIT 20;

nodes.name: Classify Document
nodes.notes: Replace with LLM API call in production (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

parameters.query: UPDATE documents SET category = $1, confidence_score = $2, priority = $3, tags = $4, keywords = $5, status = 'classified', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $6;

INSERT INTO document_extractions (document_id, client_id, extraction_type, status, result_data, confidence_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'classification', 'completed', $3, $4, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
